testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing (CBT) at Pearson VUE test centers; offered multiple times per year

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match SOA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No personal calculators unless on approved list. Approved calculators: BA-35, BA II Plus, TI-30XS Multiview, TI-30X IIS, TI-30Xa, TI-36X Pro only. No other electronic devices permitted. Scratch paper provided by testing center.
renewal_options: Passed exams do not expire. Passing scores are set by the SOA grading committee after each sitting. Candidates must meet all exam and educational requirements to earn the ASA or FSA designation.

retake_policy.notes: Maximum 3 attempts per calendar year. 90-day waiting period between attempts. Full exam fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: SOA Exam Syllabi and Study Notes
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable syllabi and study notes for each exam
